series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Estimated W/H Tax Payment Coupon for Pass-Through Entities/Trust
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by Pass-Through Entities and trusts to make estimated payments on a quarterly basis.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Keep scanned. If not scanned, keep retention. ; Electronic: An electronic record is maintained via ODT Info System 10 years
